message:
feat(core/func/vfs): add UDF registration API, fix trigger semantics, fix VFS lock types

Connection (fsqlite-core):
- Add register_scalar_function(), register_aggregate_function(), and
  register_window_function() APIs for runtime UDF registration. Functions
  become available immediately for new queries. Uses RefCell<Arc<FunctionRegistry>>
  to allow mutation after connection creation while maintaining thread-safety
  for the VDBE engine's shared reference.
- Wire custom aggregate UDF names to the codegen thread-local so they emit
  AggStep/AggFinal opcodes instead of PureFunc.
- Fix UPDATE OF trigger semantics: SQLite fires UPDATE OF triggers based on
  whether the column appears in the SET clause, not whether the value
  actually changed. Simplify trigger_update_of_columns_changed to always
  return true (the SET clause check is handled by trigger_event_matches).
- Add test_data_visibility_after_explicit_txn diagnostic test.

Function registry (fsqlite-func):
- Add UDF registration metrics (counter, snapshot, reset).
- Add clone_from_arc() for producing mutable copies during UDF registration.
- Add aggregate_names_lowercase() for exposing custom aggregate names to
  the codegen layer.

Unix VFS (fsqlite-vfs):
- Add .into() conversion for libc lock type constants (F_RDLCK, F_WRLCK,
  F_UNLCK) to fix type mismatch on platforms where these constants are
  not c_int (e.g., some musl/cross-compilation targets).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
